title: Cubesium
description: Optimize your game even in cases where it is very difficult
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1599c9ccf14ce9282247f204ec6a9f2332110ba3.png)


<details>
<summary>subcategories</summary>

Fabric

1. FL - contains more optimization mods
2. OF - contains optifine functions
3. FV - for versions below 1.18

Forge

1. FOF - contains optifine functions
2. FFL - contains more optimization mods

</details>

# recommendations

- I recommend downloading several mods like dynamic lighting and so on for the atmosphere

- If you want to reduce the RAM consumed by Minecraft, do not add MemoryLeakFix
